title: Notification of the Establishment of MSME Fund, an exercise of the powers conferred by section 12 of the Micro Small and Medium Enterprises Development Act
description: Notification of the Establishment of MSME Fund, an exercise of the powers conferred by section 12 of the Micro Small and Medium Enterprises Development Act

L.-33004/99 vlk/kj.k EXTRAORDINARY Hkkx II—[k.M 3—mi&[k.M (ii) PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (ii) izkf/dkj ls izdkf'kr PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY la- 2604] ubZ fnYyh] cq/okj] uoEcj 2] 2016@dk£rd 11] 1938 No. 2604] NEW DELHI, WEDNESDAY, NOVEMBER 2, 2016/KARTIKA 11, 1938 सू᭯ म, लघु एवं म᭟यम उ᳒ म मंᮢ ालय अिधसूचना नई ᳰद᭨ली, 28 अ᭍तूबर, 2016 का.आ. 3356(अ).—सू᭯म, लघु एवं म᭟यम उ᳒म िवकास अिधिनयम, 2006 (2006 का 27) कᳱ धारा 12 ᳇ारा ᮧद᭜त शि᭍तयᲂ का ᮧयोग करते ᱟए के᭠ᮤ सरकार एतद᳇ारा सू᭯ म, लघु एवं म᭟यम िनिध नामक िनिध ᭭ थािपत करती है िजसका उपयोग िविश᳥ ᱨप से उᲦ अिधिनयम कᳱ धारा 9 कᳱ उपध ारा (1) मᱶ िन᳸द᳥ कायᲄ के िलए ᳰकया जाएगा । [फा. सं. 2/3(1)/2016-एमएसएमई नीित] सुरे᭠ ᮤ नाथ िᮢपाठी, अपर सिचव MINISTRY OF MICRO, SMALL AND MEDIUM ENTERPRISES NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 28th October, 2016 S.O. 3356(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by section 12 of the Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises Development Act, 2006 (27 of 2006), the Central Government hereby establishes a fund to be called the Micro Small and Medium Enterprises Fund to be utilised exclusively for the measures specified in sub-section (1) of section 9 of the said Act. [F. No. 2/3(1)/2016-MSME Policy] SURENDRA NATH TRIPATHI, Addl. Secy. 5094 GI/2016 Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 1 of 1 --
